title: Regenerate the impact registry: record the three new suites' edges (test_verify_timeout, test_bypass_matrix, test_hook_vendor_closure) + refreshed edges from the feature's source changes
action: Wave-close impacted run went red on scripts/test_impact_registry.mjs: the stored registry no longer matches a fresh regeneration because this feature added three suites and changed source edges. Run the registry's own regen command (read scripts/impact_registry.mjs usage — expected `node scripts/impact_registry.mjs --write`), confirm `node scripts/impact_registry.mjs --check` exits 0 and `node scripts/test_impact_registry.mjs` is fully green (19/19). The registry file path is wherever --write puts it (verify the actual path from the script; declare-adjust if it differs from files[]). If release_manifest hashes the registry file, also rerun node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write and include it. NO hand edits to the registry JSON — regen only. One commit with i54-closeout-10 in the message.

prohibitions: no source-code changes — regen artifacts only

verify: node scripts/impact_registry.mjs --check && node scripts/test_impact_registry.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check

trace.outcome: Regenerated impact registry with three new test suites (test_verify_timeout, test_bypass_matrix, test_hook_vendor_closure) and refreshed edges. Registry check and full test suite (19/19) pass.
